title: Silky Smooth Ukrainian Cheese Pasta
description: A cultured and pillowy Ukrainian dish featuring lemon zest and tempering chocolate, this ovo-vegetarian friendly recipe is perfect for adventurous eaters. It combines the richness of cheese and chocolate with the brightness of lemon zest.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pappardelle pasta according to the package instructions until it is al dente.
In a medium saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat and add the lemon zest, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the tempering chocolate to the saucepan and stir until melted and smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the Ukrainian cheese, heavy cream, eggs, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss until the pasta is well coated with the cheese mixture.
Add the chocolate and lemon zest mixture to the bowl and toss until the pasta is well coated.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional lemon zest if desired.
Let the pasta cool for a few minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
